title: Occupational functioning review

examination.text: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.
examination.rationale: Supports comprehensive assessment of function, employment and context for mental-health occupational functioning; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.

treatment_and_management.text: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports anxiety-related distress and functional assessment for mental-health occupational functioning; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Role, duties, attendance, performance, symptoms, workplace factors, adjustments, risk, certification and clinician plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for mental-health occupational functioning.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
